style_name: Blue Bubble Fisheye Action Poster Style
summary: A crisp white youth-culture action poster style with a rectangular fisheye photograph, oversized rounded royal-blue display typography, frame-breaking foreground scale, small blue editorial captions, and one red hand-drawn annotation circle.
prompt_template:
Create an image in blue-bubble-fisheye-action-poster-style.

Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, featuring {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, in {LOCATION}. Include {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Style the subject with {WARDROBE_STYLE}.

Photography: use an extreme low-angle fisheye or action-camera lens, very close to the foreground object, with barrel distortion, edge stretching, motion blur near the edges, bright daylight, blue sky or open high-key light, crisp highlights, realistic skin, fabric, product surfaces, and believable anatomy.

Layout: build a clean white editorial poster canvas with a central rectangular action photo. Let one foreground hand, foot, prop, or product detail become huge and optionally break past the photo rectangle into the white margin. Keep the poster layer flat, precise, and uncluttered.

Typography: set "{MAIN_TEXT}" as massive rounded royal-blue bubble lettering cropped behind or above the photo block. Keep supporting text small, geometric, and blue. Add "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" only as compact editorial microcopy in the bottom margin.

Graphic system: include {ACCENT_SYMBOL}, a small non-scannable stripe block, and balanced lower-margin caption groups. Use a rough red marker circle to highlight one product or movement detail.

Avoid: watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, platform logos, app interface marks, QR codes, scannable barcodes, copied reference people, copied poses, copied text, recognizable logos, brand-owned product marks, long paragraphs, cluttered collage, dark cyberpunk lighting, luxury minimalism, flat vector substitutes, SVG or HTML mockup looks, distorted faces, extra limbs, extra fingers, malformed hands, and unreadable main headline.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, app interface, QR code, scannable barcode, copied PUNK text, copied reference slogan, copied creator credit, copied skateboarder, exact original pose, exact shoe brand mark, recognizable logo, long paragraph text, cluttered collage, dark cyberpunk scene, luxury beige editorial, flat vector substitute, SVG look, HTML mockup, canvas drawing, distorted face, extra limbs, extra fingers, malformed hands, unreadable main headline

variables.SUBJECT: adult action subject, performer, courier, maker, athlete, rider, dancer, chef, technician, or product model
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: lunging toward the lens, reaching across the frame, jumping over the camera, presenting a prop, balancing in motion, or landing in a dramatic wide-angle pose
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: featured object, shoe, bag, tool, instrument, food item, plant crate, wearable, device, or product detail that can be emphasized by perspective
variables.LOCATION: sunny urban roof, bright plaza, skateable concrete space, clean market aisle, public court, workshop, studio patio, transit deck, or open daylight environment
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: blue sky, motion-blurred edges, white poster margin, rectangular photo crop, oversized blue bubble headline, small editorial text blocks, non-scannable stripe code, and red hand-drawn circle annotation
variables.MAIN_TEXT: short rounded headline, 1 to 2 words, set as huge blue bubble lettering cropped behind or above the photo
variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small two-line editorial caption or slogan in blue, placed near the lower margin
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: red hand-drawn circle, thin underline, tiny blue divider, or non-scannable stripe block
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: casual streetwear, sport utility layers, shorts, sneakers, sunglasses, cap, apron, technical vest, or color-blocked everyday clothing

variables.SUBJECT: adult rooftop courier
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: lunging toward a low fisheye camera while lowering a small plant crate
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: translucent green plant delivery crate, circled in rough red marker
variables.LOCATION: sunny urban rooftop garden with pale concrete and blue sky
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: motion-blurred roof edge, white poster border, central photo rectangle, oversized blue bubble headline behind the image, tiny bottom captions, and compact non-scannable stripe block
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: red hand-drawn oval around the plant crate
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: olive utility vest, light shorts, white socks, clean black sneakers with no logo

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a 16:9 horizontal image in the "Blue Bubble Fisheye Action Poster" visual style. Subject: adult rooftop courier. Action: sliding across a sunlit rooftop garden and reaching a plant crate toward the lens. Prop/Product: translucent green plant delivery crate, circled in rough red marker. Location: bright urban rooftop with planters, pale concrete, and open blue sky. Background: horizontal fisheye photo rectangle, motion blur at the sides, white poster field, giant rounded blue headline behind the photo, small blue caption groups along the bottom, compact non-scannable stripe block. Main text: GROW FAST. Secondary text: fresh route / roof level. Accent symbol: red hand-drawn oval around the plant crate. Wardrobe/styling: olive utility vest, light shorts, white socks, clean black sneakers with no logo. Make the foreground hand and crate oversized through fisheye distortion, keep the layout crisp and poster-like, and use bright daylight with a clean magazine finish. Do not copy the original skateboard scene, text, person, shoe branding, or exact pose.
example_cases.prompt_9x16: Create a 9:16 vertical image in the "Blue Bubble Fisheye Action Poster" visual style. Subject: adult rooftop courier. Action: lunging toward a low fisheye camera while lowering a small plant crate. Prop/Product: translucent green plant delivery crate, circled in rough red marker. Location: sunny urban rooftop garden with pale concrete and blue sky. Background: motion-blurred roof edge, white poster border, central vertical photo rectangle, oversized blue bubble headline behind the image, tiny bottom captions, compact non-scannable stripe block. Main text: GROW FAST. Secondary text: fresh route / roof level. Accent symbol: red hand-drawn oval around the plant crate. Wardrobe/styling: olive utility vest, light shorts, white socks, clean black sneakers with no logo. Use a clean white editorial poster canvas, massive rounded royal-blue headline cropped at the top, extreme low-angle fisheye photography, a foreground hand and crate exaggerated toward the viewer, bright daylight, blue sky, and small blue editorial microcopy in the lower margin. Avoid copied reference content, watermarks, logos, QR codes, exact sneaker marks, or scannable barcode.

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a 16:9 horizontal image in the "Blue Bubble Fisheye Action Poster" visual style. Subject: adult solar field runner. Location: solar test lane with geometric panels, pale concrete, and open sky. Background: horizontal fisheye photo rectangle, motion-blurred solar panels, white poster field, huge blue rounded bubble headline across the back layer, small blue caption blocks at lower left and lower right, compact non-scannable stripe block. Main text: SUN RUSH. Secondary text: bright test / lane 02. Accent symbol: red marker circle around the sensor. Wardrobe/styling: cobalt windbreaker, black running shorts, reflective sunglasses, white low-profile shoes with no logo. Keep the poster clean, high-key, and playful; exaggerate the foreground wrist and shoe with fisheye distortion while preserving realistic anatomy and no recognizable branding.
example_cases.prompt_9x16: Create a 9:16 vertical image in the "Blue Bubble Fisheye Action Poster" visual style. Subject: adult solar field runner. Location: bright solar test lane with pale panels and a clear blue sky. Background: rectangular vertical photo crop, lens-warped panels, radial motion blur, white poster margin, huge rounded blue headline peeking from behind the photo, tiny blue bottom copy, compact non-scannable stripe block. Main text: SUN RUSH. Secondary text: bright test / lane 02. Accent symbol: red hand-drawn circle around the wrist sensor. Wardrobe/styling: cobalt windbreaker, black running shorts, reflective sunglasses, white low-profile shoes with no logo. Use extreme low-angle fisheye action photography, foreground shoe and wrist enlarged toward the viewer, bright outdoor sunlight, saturated blue sky, and clean white editorial poster spacing. No logos, watermarks, QR codes, copied reference text, or scannable barcode.
